data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a fast owner-centric index for API/UI.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Fast owner-centric index for API/UI'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or results that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case outlines the need for a fast index, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to validate this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of a fast owner-centric index for API/UI.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fast owner-centric index requirement.
